itemListElement.reviewBody:
I got only 50 percent in 8th standard. In 9 th standard j came into this school and I see a dramatic change in myself. The time continues
and in 12th standard I become the HOUSE CAPTAIN of my house and lead the entire school.
This school just changed my life.
Really missing those golden days.

BEST SCHOOL EVER

itemReviewed.name: St Crispins Senior Secondary School - Jacobpura,Sector 12

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I recently attended my child's (Koshini Sai UKG) school for an incredible Mother's Day celebration, and it exceeded all my expectations. The dance performances by the children were simply enchanting, showcasing their genuine expressions and remarkable talent.
I want to express my heartfelt appreciation to the dedicated teachers who worked tirelessly to nurture these young talents. Their efforts were evident in the flawless execution of the dances and the overall coordination of the event.
The principal's motivational speech left a lasting impact on me, using a beautiful analogy of fitting a pumpkin into a small mouth jar to illustrate the delicate process of raising a child. It was truly thought-provoking and inspiring.
The organizers also planned fun and engaging games for the mothers, creating a joyful and inclusive atmosphere. I thoroughly enjoyed participating in the activities and connecting with other moms in the school community.
Overall, the Mother's Day celebration at my child's school was a truly memorable experience. The teachers, principal, and organizers deserve commendation for their dedication to excellence and their genuine appreciation of mothers.
I highly recommend this school to anyone seeking an educational institution that values nurturing and supportive environments. The Mother's Day celebration was a testament to their commitment to creating lasting memories and making parents feel valued
The Mother's Day celebration at the  school was an absolute delight. It was a day filled with love, joy, and appreciation, making it a truly unforgettable experience for all the mothers in attendance

itemReviewed.name: St Crispins Senior Secondary School - Jacobpura,Sector 12

itemListElement.reviewBody: My son studies in LKG class in this school. Mother's Day was celebrated in the school on 12th May. Small children gave a very good performance on this occasion.Along with the performance of the students, there were also games and activities for the mothers, who enjoyed the game a lot.thank you principal mam, teachers and staff.

itemReviewed.name: St Crispins Senior Secondary School - Jacobpura,Sector 12

itemListElement.reviewBody: It has been a great educational journey with school. I have seen 360 degree improvement in my daughter since first term till today when the result was declared. She is much confident and smart now. Definitely credit goes to her teachers and  Principal Mam for curating educational curriculum which is making children well versed with current competitive environment and giving overall development. Grateful to all the Teachers and Principal Mam for being so  kind, helpful and supportive.

itemReviewed.name: St Crispins Senior Secondary School - Jacobpura,Sector 12

itemListElement.reviewBody: My daughter studies in this school in Nursery. We went for the Christmas event Yuletide Magic, which exceeded our expectations. The entire program was very well organised by the school and their teacher's efforts were evident in the kids performance.
